name: Kroot Linebreakers

src.description: Each time this unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it, then roll one D6 for each model in this unit that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit:for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds. If one or more enemy models are destroyed as a result of these mortal wounds, that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

note: Misses per-model roll requirement and battle-shock test trigger

name: Aggressive Deployment

src.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this TRANSPORT this turn makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

note: Timing wrong; applies after shooting specific enemy, not all targets

name: Air Caste Colossus

src.description: Each time you target this model with a Stratagem, you must spend three times that Stratagem’s stated CP cost to do so.

note: Indicates spend triple CP but notation opaque

name: Fireknife

src.description: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If that attack targets a unit that is at its Starting Strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

note: Condition unclear; reroll ones normally, any hit if starting strength

name: Marker Drone

src.description: The bearer’s unit has the MARKERLIGHT keyword and can act as an Observer unit for another unit even if it Advanced this turn.

note: Dual mechanics vague; markerlight keyword plus observer timing condition

name: Forward Observers

src.description: Each time this unit is an Observer unit, until the end of the phase, each time a ranged attack is made by a model in a Guided unit that targets their Spotted unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

note: Timing unclear; requires observer role and guided unit pairing context

name: Homing Beacon

src.description: Once per battle, you can use the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP. The target must be set up within 3"of the bearer’s unit and more than 9"away from all enemy units.

note: Refund notation wrong; actually enables Rapid Ingress stratagem for 0CP

name: Pulse Bombs

src.description: Each time this model ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll six D6:for each 4+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

note: Misses 6D6 roll and 4+ threshold per die

name: Target Uploaded

src.description: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets their Spotted unit, improve the Ballistic Skill characteristic of that attack by 1 and that attack has the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

note: Missing BS improvement; ignores cover only portion captured

name: Suppression Volley

src.description: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy INFANTRY unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, while this unit is on the battlefield, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

note: Timing wrong; suppression is not permanent aura

name: DS8 Support Turret

src.description:
In your Movement phase, if this unit Remains Stationary, until the start of your next turn, its Shas’ui model is equipped with the support turret weapon.

Designer’s Note:Place a Support Turret token next to this unit to remind you.

note: Flavor text unhelpful; actual mechanic is conditional weapon swap

name: Exemplars of Mont’ka

src.description: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target, that attack has the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] and [IGNORES COVER] abilities.

note: Missing "closest eligible target" condition

name: Neocapacitor Shields

src.description: At the start of your opponent’s Charge phase, you can select one enemy unit (excluding MONSTER and VEHICLE units) within 12"of this unit. That unit must take a Battle‑shock test and, until the end of the turn, subtract 1 from Charge rolls made for that unit.

note: Misses charge penalty (-1) and monster/vehicle exclusion

name: Strafing Run

src.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks that cannot FLY. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

note: Missing cannot FLY unit restriction

name: Titan-killer

src.description: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a TITANIC or TOWERING unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

note: Omits target restriction (titanic/towering units only)

name: Firing Deck 11

src.description: Each time this TRANSPORT shoots, select one weapon from up to 11 of models embarked within it whose units have not shot this phase; this TRANSPORT counts as being equipped with those weapons as well.

note: Misses that weapons are selected from embarked units, not unit itself

name: Fortification

src.description:
While an enemy unit is only within Engagement Range of one or more FORTIFICATIONS from your army:

■ That unit can still be selected as the target of ranged attacks, but each time such an attack is made, unless it is made with a Pistol, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
■ Models in that unit do not need to take Desperate Escape tests due to Falling Back while Battle-shocked, except for those that will move over enemy models when doing so.

note: Covers -1 to hit but misses pistol carveout and desperate escape mechanics

name: Tidewall Cover

src.description: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this FORTIFICATION, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

note: Simplified; cover applies conditionally based on line of sight

name: Leader

src.description: Before the battle, CHARACTER units with the Leader ability can be attached to one of their Bodyguard units to form an Attached unit.

note: Trivializes mechanic; actual rule requires pre-battle attachment decision

name: Coordinated Leadership

src.description: At the end of your Command phase, roll one D6:on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

note: Omits d6 roll requirement (probabilistic, not guaranteed CP)

name: Deadly Demise D6

src.description: When this model is destroyed, roll one D6 before removing it from play. On a 6, each unit within 6" of that model suffers a number of mortal wounds denoted by D6.

note: Condition unclear (why 6+, not just 6); scope chain (destroyed -> d6 damage)

name: Nova Charge

src.description: Once per battle, when this unit is selected to shoot in your Shooting phase, select one ranged weapon equipped by this model. Until the end of the phase, that weapon has the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

note: Once per battle, single weapon restriction; says all weapons

name: Weapon Support System

src.description: Each time this model makes a ranged attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

note: Scope wrong (all modifiers vs hit roll only); omits wound roll choice

name: Missile Drone

src.description: The bearer is equipped with the following ranged weapon:

note: Nonsensical; ability defines a weapon, not equipment gain

name: Way of the Short Blade

src.description: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit within 9",add 1 to the Wound roll.

note: Range restriction (9") omitted from bonus application

name: Kroot Packmates

src.description: Once per turn, in your opponent’s Shooting phase, when a friendly KROOT INFANTRY unit within 6"of this unit is selected as the target of an attack, one unit from your army with this ability can use it. If it does, after that enemy unit has finished making its attacks, that unit with this ability can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but when resolving those attacks it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target).

note: Glosses complex reaction: opponent's phase counter-attack, single-target lock

name: Hero of the Empire (Aura)

src.description: While a friendly T’AU EMPIRE unit is within 6"of this model, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

note: Says all failures; should be ones only

name: Command-link Drone (Aura)

src.description: While a friendly T’AU EMPIRE unit is within 6"of the bearer, each time you select that unit as the target of a Stratagem, roll one D6:on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

note: Omits roll requirement (d6, 5+); probabilistic not guaranteed

name: Stealth Drones

src.description:
Twice per battle, after an attack has been allocated to this model, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

Designer’s Note:Place two Stealth Drone tokens next to the unit, removing one each time this ability has been used.

note: Unknown damage reduction value; capacity limit (twice per battle)

name: Titan Hunter

src.description: This model’s twin heavy rail cannon and seeker missiles have the [ANTI-TITANIC 3+] ability while targeting a unit within half range.

note: Unknown range; specific weapons + condition unclear

name: Targeting Array

src.description: Each time this model is selected to shoot, you can re-roll one Hit roll or you can re-roll one Wound roll when resolving those attacks.

note: All failures vs one roll choice; omits wound roll alternative

name: Airborne Agility

src.description: At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

note: Condition (not in engagement range) implicit; timing unclear

name: Coldstar Commander

src.description: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have a Move characteristic of 12"and ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [ASSAULT] ability.

note: Omits assault weapons; only covers movement bonus

name: Shield Generator

src.description: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save.

note: Unknown invulnerable save value

name: Trail Finding

src.description: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9"of this model’s unit, if this model’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to D6".

note: Once per turn reaction after enemy move; wrong scope

name: Kroot Ambush

src.description: After both players have deployed their armies, you can redeploy this model’s unit and one other friendly KROOT unit. When doing so, any of those units can be placed into Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

note: Vague (modify stats); actual rule is redeployment+reserves placement

name: Firing Deck 20

src.description: Each time this TRANSPORT shoots, select one weapon from up to 20 of models embarked within it whose units have not shot this phase; this TRANSPORT counts as being equipped with those weapons as well.

note: Same issue as firing-deck-11; misses weapon selection from embarked units

name: Advanced Armour

src.description: Models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds.

note: Feel No Pain 4+ but restricted to mortal wounds only

name: Enforcer Commander

src.description: While this model is leading a unit, each time a ranged attack targets that unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

note: Scope wrong (applies to unit's ranged attacks, not incoming)

name: Crack Shot

src.description: Each time this model makes a ranged attack, on a Critical Wound, that attack has an Armour Penetration characteristic of -3.

note: Double negative confusing; applies only on critical wounds

name: Ground Strike Fighter

src.description: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit that cannot FLY, add 1 to the Hit roll.

note: Target restriction (non-flying) omitted

name: Rapid Deployment

src.description: Units can disembark from this TRANSPORT after it has Advanced. Units that do so count as having made a Normal move that phase, and cannot declare a charge in the same turn, but can otherwise act normally in the remainder of the turn.

note: Vague; specific constraints: disembark after advance, can't charge

name: Armour Hunter

src.description: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE, add 1 to the Hit roll.

note: Target type condition (monster/vehicle) missing

name: Droneport

src.description: Each time this FORTIFICATION is selected to shoot, its drone defenders weapon will target and resolve attacks against every enemy unit that is an eligible target to this FORTIFICATION.

note: Multi-target mechanic unclear; once per battle

name: Sunforge

src.description: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll and you can re-roll the Damage roll.

note: Target type condition (monster/vehicle) missing

name: Precise Targeting

src.description: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a Spotted unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

note: Spotted mechanic introduced without definition context

name: Fieldcraft

src.description: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

note: Incomprehensible; objective control mechanic is complex doctrine

name: Bodyguard

src.description: If this unit has a Starting Strength of 20, you can attach up to two Leader units to it instead of one, provided those Leaders are not duplicates (e.g. you cannot attach two WAR SHAPERS to this unit). If you do, and this unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units with their original Starting Strengths.

note: Vague; rule involves dual-leader attachment under strength 20

name: Advanced Scouting

src.description: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that hits an enemy unit, until the end of the turn, each time another KROOT model from your army makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

note: Chain mechanic: hit unlocks rerolls for other kroot units

name: Rites of Feasting

src.description: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability. If that unit destroys one or more enemy units in the Fight phase, until the end of the battle, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability instead.

note: Omits escalation (5+ after destroying units)

name: Jet Pack Insertion

src.description: At the end of your opponent’s Movement phase, one or more units embarked within this Transport can disembark from it, provided every model in each of those disembarking units has the Deep Strike ability.

note: Deep strike wrong; disembarks only models with deep strike ability

name: Photon Casters

src.description: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if an enemy Infantry unit was hit by one or more of those attacks, until the end of your opponent’s next turn, that enemy unit is stunned. While a unit is stunned, subtract 2 from that unit’s Move characteristic, and subtract 2 from Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.

note: Vague (modify stats); actual stun mechanic complex

name: Loping Stride

src.description: Each time this model Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of this model.

note: Describes flat +6M; official only adds 6M during advance, not all movements

name: Baggage Harness (Aura)

src.description: While a friendly Kroot unit is within 3" of the bearer, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

note: Aura range wrong: 6" vs 3"; applies to ranged weapons only, not all

name: Reinforced Cover

src.description: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this Fortification, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

note: Scope wrong (fortification, not unit); conditions misaligned

name: Sentinel Protocols

src.description: Each time you select this Fortification for the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+ when resolving that Stratagem.

note: Penalty context wrong; fire overwatch mechanic only, not general

name: Orbital Comms Array (Aura)

src.description: While a friendly T'au Empire unit is within 6" of this Fortification, each time you target that unit with a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

note: Missing roll mechanic; only gains CP on 5+ per stratagem use

name: Drone Escort

src.description: Once per turn, in your opponent’s Shooting phase, when a friendly T'au Empire unit within 6" of this unit is selected as the target of an attack, one unit from your army with this ability can use it. If it does, after that enemy unit has finished making its attacks, the unit using this ability can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but when resolving those attacks it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target).

note: Mechanic vague; complex counterattack in opp. shooting omitted

name: Drones

src.description:
If you have upgraded a model to have a drone, place a Drone token next to your model as a reminder. These do not count as models for any rules purposes.
Guardian Drone: Each time a model makes a ranged attack that targets the bearer’s unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.
Gun Drone: The bearer is equipped with the following ranged weapon:-
Marker Drone: The bearer’s unit has the MARKERLIGHT keyword and can act as an Observer unit for another unit even if it Advanced this turn.
Missile Drone: The bearer is equipped with the following ranged weapon:-
Shield Drone: Add 1 to the bearer’s Wounds characteristic.

note: Multiple drone types conflated; only describes guardian, ignores gun/missile/marker/shield

name: For the Greater Good
note: Observer/Guided/Spotted mechanics oversimplified; markerlight condition incomplete

name: Deadly Demise D6+3

src.description: When this model is destroyed, roll one D6 before removing it from play. On a 6, each unit within 6" of that model suffers a number of mortal wounds denoted by D6+3.

note: Damage value D6+3 rendered as 'D6'; affected units unclear

name: Super-heavy Walker

src.description: Each time this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move over models (excluding TITANIC models) and terrain features that are 4"or less in height as if they were not there.

note: Movement ability truncated; overlapping terrain < 4" not captured
